title: vicia esculenta
intro: Vicia esculenta, also known as the grass pea or Lathyrus, is a type of annual legume plant that is native to the mountainous regions of the Indian subcontinent. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vicia esculenta include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve digestion, making it a popular natural remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, Vicia esculenta is often used in the form of powder, capsules, or tea, and is also used in traditional Indian medicine, Ayurveda, to treat a range of ailments.
